case_title: THE ATTORNEY GENERAL OF CANADA VS. CHLOE HARRISON

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE ATTORNEY GENERAL OF CANADA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRISON, CHLOE $20,543.90 PRINCIPAL, $3,067.23 INTEREST, $111.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,722.13, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
